testcase.name: test_pattern_payload_supports_cup_and_handle_and_sym_triangle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_signal_platform_api.py:176: in test_pattern_payload_supports_cup_and_handle_and_sym_triangle assert list_response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
